understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to complete each KA59 level by positioning every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' in the semantic grid, with the requirement that all goals be simultaneously occupied by selectables for the engine to register a WIN and allow progression through all levels to finish the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used directional actions that attempted to shift the currently selected piece by one 3-pixel cell per action in the grid coordinate system (x right, y down). Walls and other obstacles could block movement, while certain adjacent objects (e.g., blocks) could be pushable and move along if pushed in the movement direction. Levels could contain multiple selectable pieces, and control was switched by CLICKing the exact pixel/grid position of another selectable; the movement_blocked flags were only heuristic indicators of adjacency and did not guarantee success or failure, so actual movement outcomes had to be tested within a finite step budget.

understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to complete each KA59 level by positioning every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' in the semantic grid, with the requirement that all goals be simultaneously occupied by selectables for the engine to register a WIN and allow progression through all levels to finish the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used directional actions that attempted to shift the currently selected piece by one 3-pixel cell per action in the grid coordinate system (x right, y down). Walls and other obstacles could block movement, while certain adjacent objects (e.g., blocks) could be pushable and move along if pushed in the movement direction. Levels could contain multiple selectable pieces, and control was switched by CLICKing the exact pixel/grid position of another selectable; the movement_blocked flags were only heuristic indicators of adjacency and did not guarantee success or failure, so actual movement outcomes had to be tested within a finite step budget.
